name: SerpApi Search
description: Google search results via SerpApi. Returns structured SERP data including answer boxes, knowledge panels, and organic results.

scope.summary: Fetches Google search results in structured format
capabilities: Run Google searches and get structured results
Access featured snippets and answer boxes
Get organic search results with URLs and snippets
scope.note: Your queries are sent to SerpApi's servers, which proxy Google search.

config.get_key_instructions: Sign up at serpapi.com → Dashboard → API Key
